$comment: Example LPDF_DIE_BLEND_MODE finding (D-08). Emitted when a dieline / cutter spot is painted with a blend mode other than Normal — non-Normal blend modes do not survive RIP separation, so the cutter plate ends up missing or the wrong colour. ISO 32000-2:2020 §11.6.2 / ISO 19593-1 §5.3.
message: Dieline 'Dieline' painted with non-Normal blend mode(s) ['Multiply'] on page 1 (1 paint op(s)) — RIP will drop or composite the cutter plate
